name: Mouwasat Medical Services Company
summary: Mouwasat Medical Services Company acquires, manages, operates, and maintains hospitals, medical centers, drug stores, and pharmacies in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. It operates a network of hospitals in Dammam, Jubail, Madinah, Khobar, Qatif, and Riyadh that provides a range of medical services. The company also operates skin care centers that offer clinical and cosmetic dermatology, aesthetic and reconstructive plastic surgery, weight reduction, and esthetician services; a fertility center; and a clinic for bariatric surgery. In addition, it is involved in the wholesale of medical equipment and drugs. The company was founded in 1974 and is based in Dammam, the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
